article_meta.title: EntrepreneursMeet Angelica Nwandu: Founder Of The Shade Room, Instagram's 3rd Most Engaged ProfileByTommy

reasoning: Multiple major failures: flagged quoted/attributed language as author bias, used non-standard/incorrect bias type labels, misapplied Bias by Omission, and missed several clear instances in author prose. Formatting also violated with code fences.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Three of five items are direct quotes or clearly attributed paraphrase ("sign from God" lines; "most people see... she says"), violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Majority of flagged items are invalid due to attribution errors; remaining two are arguable but not cleanly justified as the listed bias types.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias such as subjective 'great opportunity,' 'impressive' (mislabelled), 'Ironically,' and supportive framing like 'doing just that.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (Positive/Promotional Bias, Hagiographic Bias) and misapplied/renamed Bias by Omission; correct labels would include Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Spin/Word Choice, Slant.
